FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.45sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f831d9841a0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'user_list': [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}], 'test_username': 'testuser'}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1005: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/07/15 23:35:41.969528438 "default"))

2026/07/15 23:35:41.969138585 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969146316 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969174347 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969175189 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969192364 {
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969192955 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969201858 new <- list()
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969202579 if (!missing(width))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969211632 new$width <- width
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969212093 if (!missing(height))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969225913 new$height <- height
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969226674 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969240114 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969249478 if (!missing(title))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969250179 new$title <- title
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969260995 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969269767 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969272962 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969283528 new$version <- version
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969300643 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969316015 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969316767 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969330847 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969331568 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969345709 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969346430 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969359349 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969360090 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969372549 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969373009 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969387490 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969388382 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969415993 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969417385 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969433208 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969433639 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969443002 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969443433 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969452787 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969453217 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969466807 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969467278 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969492055 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969492816 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969510592 enc <- family$encoding
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969511313 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969527787 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969528438 "default"))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969539084 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969539604 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969548668 }
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969549409 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969558722 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969559263 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969573694 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969574406 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969586793 }
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969592382 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969602527 }
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969603308 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969614675 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969615155 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969647903 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969648745 domain = NA)
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969665279 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969666110 }
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969680231 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969681032 old$family <- family
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969695693 }
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969696555 version <- old$version
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969717976 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969719228 "2.0")
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969734290 if (version %in% versions)
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969735071 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969743885 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969755842 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969764935 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969765707 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969782251 domain = NA)
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969782992 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969820247 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969821178 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969833907 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969834568 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969849980 invisible()
2026/07/15 23:35:41.969850671 }
